name: Kentucky Rebel Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first five ingredients in a bowl until well mixed.
2. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie shell.
3. Sprinkle the chocolate chips evenly over the top of the filling.
4. Pat the crust down with a spatula to ensure an even surface.
5. Place the pecans or walnuts on top of the filling.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes.
